query: Quick PR review on the changes I just made in src/utils/format.ts and src/utils/parse.ts — Critical/Warning/Info breakdown. Should take 5 min, just the obvious issues.
Review my last 4 commits before I push the PR. I want a quick pass — security/correctness/structure/test impact, but not a deep audit.
Just finished the order validation refactor (src/order/validators/, ~280 lines). Run a 5-axis review pass on the diff before I open the PR.
Review file src/auth/oauth.ts. 3-tier breakdown please. Focus on the new token refresh logic I added at the bottom.
5 min PR review on my changes pls. nothing too deep just the obvious stuff. last 2 commits
Run a code review on the diff between origin/main and HEAD. I want Critical/Warning/Info findings — keep it light, this is a small PR.
I changed handlers/payment.ts and handlers/refund.ts (~150 lines combined). Want a quick sanity check on style, security, and edge cases before I push to the PR branch.
code review on my last commit pls, lemme know if anything jumps out. nothing crazy, just a small refactor of the search query builder
Review the changes in src/ between commits abc123 and HEAD with a 3-tier severity breakdown — Critical/Warning/Info.
I refactored the search query parser in src/search/parser.ts. Light review pass — am I missing obvious things? PR-quality, not merge-quality.
Deep security audit on src/api/auth/ before merge. Inject vectors, panic sources, race conditions — S-Critical/S-High findings only.
Compare my implementation in src/order/ against DESIGN/03_order.md. Show me Missing/Diverged/Extra/Constraint findings.
There's a bug in handlers/order.ts that's failing tests. Fix it and verify regression tests still pass after.
Add JSDoc comments to all the public functions in src/utils/format.ts — formatDate, parseDate, formatCurrency, parseCurrency.
What's the best way to handle async errors in TypeScript with strict mode enabled?
Generate unit tests for the OrderValidator class in src/order/validators/OrderValidator.ts — 80%+ coverage target.
Pre-release security review on the entire src/auth/ tree. I need this to be thorough — authorization, session handling, token storage, everything.
Help me write a regex that matches valid email addresses including IDN (international domain names).
Implement the search component end-to-end from DESIGN/02_search.md including reviews and tests.
Set up ESLint rules for the new TypeScript project — strict mode, no-explicit-any, etc.
